properties.titulo_evento: Fedorov out as Ukraine’s defense minister in major government shake-up
properties.descricao: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy dismissed Mykhailo Fedorov as the country's minister of defense after just six months in office.

properties.titulo_evento: US launches new round of strikes against Iran
properties.descricao: The U.S. conducted a new wave of strikes against Iranian military sites on Wednesday after reimposing a naval blockade of the Islamic Republic's ports.

properties.titulo_evento: European firms plan exo-atmospheric interceptor for 2027 test
properties.descricao: Bliksem EXO is meant to defeat ballistic threats including Russia’s intermediate-range Oreshnik missile with separating and maneuvering re-entry vehicles.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine agrees on plan to acquire 16 Rafale jets, France’s Macron says
properties.descricao: Ukraine has agreed on a plan to acquire 16 Rafale fighter jets from France together with the accompanying weapon systems, along with air-defense equipment.

properties.titulo_evento: The Peace That Redistributes War: What Camp David Reveals About Lebanon and Iran
properties.descricao: Nothing reveals truths more effectively than patterns. If you can identify a pattern, you can see what actions conceal, what statements leave unsaid, and what agreements postpone. Peace treaties and the negotiations surrounding them are rarely ana...

properties.titulo_evento: NATO’s Unity on Paper and Fractures Beneath the Surface
properties.descricao: On July 7-8, NATO held its 36th official summit in Ankara, Turkey. There were several consequential topics to discuss at this year’s meeting, chief among them the wars in Ukraine and Iran and the uncertain future of European defense and secu...

properties.titulo_evento: Former US Ambassador says Iran miscalculated Trump’s resolve
properties.descricao: Nightly strikes between the US and Iran have been the heaviest since the Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran launches strikes on Gulf, even as FM visits Qatar
properties.descricao: Iranian FM Araghchi visits Qatar to pay respects following the death of the Father Emir, Sheikh Hamad bin al Thani

properties.titulo_evento: Two killed in Russian missile fire on Kyiv after Ukraine-EU drone deal
properties.descricao: Mayor Vitali Klitschko says emergency services are battling blazes across the Ukrainian capital.

properties.titulo_evento: Celebrations erupt in Argentina’s capital after World Cup semifinal win
properties.descricao: Jubilant fans leapt with joy in Buenos Aires after Argentina defeated England 2-1 in Wednesday’s World Cup semifinal.

properties.titulo_evento: ‘Epic squared’: Scaloni lauds Argentina’s back-to-back World Cup comebacks
properties.descricao: 'There was blood in the water, and we went for it,' Argentina coach said of the relentless late attacks against England.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: Tehran threatens to ‘crush’ infrastructure if US attacks
properties.descricao: Tehran vows to respond to any US attacks on its infrastructure with reciprocal strikes on Middle East sites.

properties.titulo_evento: US Justice Department refuses New Mexico’s request for Epstein files
properties.descricao: New Mexico says the withheld records are critical to its criminal investigation into alleged abuse at Epstein’s ranch.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran says peace deal voided, fighting ‘existential war’ after US attacks
properties.descricao: The US announced a new wave of attacks Wednesday night, amid reported explosions in Bandar Abbas, Chabahar and Ahvaz.

properties.titulo_evento: Argentina stun England in 2-1 comeback win to reach 2026 World Cup final
properties.descricao: Holders Argentina will face Spain in the final after snatching victory from England in ⁠a highly charged encounter.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
properties.descricao: Explosions were heard across Iran overnight, shortly after neighbouring Gulf states began to report attacks.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian attacks kill 14 as Ukraine hits Black Sea oil tankers
properties.descricao: Civilian casualties are reported in a number of Ukrainian regions, while Kyiv hits 20 Russian vessels in the Black Sea.

properties.titulo_evento: Italy's Meloni suffers surprise setback in close vote on electoral reform
properties.descricao: The defeat triggered opposition calls for Meloni to resign ahead of next year's general election.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela government to launch formal talks with opposition members
properties.descricao: The opposition says the aim of the talks is to strengthen the democratic institutions and the electoral system.

properties.titulo_evento: China economic growth falls sharply, missing target
properties.descricao: Weak demand domestically and the impact of the Iran war on oil prices overshadowed the country's strong exports.

properties.titulo_evento: Heatwave prompts Italy's delivery riders to strike for extra rights
properties.descricao: Delivery riders in Milan, Bologna and Florence want to protect their health and their wages.

properties.titulo_evento: Seven Britons among those killed in Spain wildfires
properties.descricao: Twelve of the 13 victims were foreign nationals, Spanish authorities said on Tuesday.

properties.titulo_evento: China detains US scientist who studied North Korea nuclear tests
properties.descricao: Chen Youlin's family says he has been wrongfully detained for nearly two years on spying charges.

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say
properties.descricao: A senior officer in the Hamas-run police force was among those killed in the strike, which Israel's military says targeted "terrorists".

properties.titulo_evento: Protests against removal of popular defence minister erupt across Ukraine
properties.descricao: Rare wartime protests in Ukraine erupted across the country on Thursday with demonstrators demanding that President Volodymyr Zelensky reappoint Mykhailo Fedorov, who was removed from office on Wednesday.

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes Iranian missile sites as tensions escalate
properties.descricao: The United States has launched fresh strikes on Iranian missile and coastal defense sites after reinstating a naval blockade. Iran responded by warning it could disrupt more regional energy exports. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump administration replaces Philadelphia slavery memorial
properties.descricao: The Trump administration has replaced panels at a Philadelphia memorial about people enslaved by George Washington. Critics argue that the new exhibit presents a sanitized view of US history.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran: Alleged Ahmadinejad plot highlights info war
properties.descricao: Reports that Israel explored a scenario to effect regime change involving former Iranian President Mahmoud Ahmadinejad reveal how the Iran war has also become a struggle over narratives and perception.

properties.titulo_evento: No support for Jews fleeing Nazi Germany at Evian conference
properties.descricao: In July 1938, a conference was held in Evian, France, to address the issue of Jews being persecuted by the Nazis in Germany and Austria. Almost nobody in the world was willing to take them in as refugees.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: Kyiv and EU agree on new drone production deal
properties.descricao: Ukraine and the EU have agreed on a drone deal combining Kyiv’s know-how with the bloc's scale-up power. Meanwhile, Russian attacks caused more fatalities in Odesa as Moscow increasingly targets the port.

properties.titulo_evento: UK investigates TikTok over child safety measures
properties.descricao: The online safety watchdog is worried about TikTok's use of "age inference" to guess users' ages.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine and its allies hope Graham isn’t their last friend with Trump’s ear
properties.descricao: Some argue that Ukraine’s agenda in Washington will suffer, others that there are other interlocutors to Trump who can step up.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump Administration to Impose New Tariffs on Brazil
properties.descricao: The United States accused the country of unfair trade practices. The tariff will replace ones that the Supreme Court struck down.

properties.titulo_evento: Senators Grill Justice Dept. Officials on New York Times Subpoenas
properties.descricao: Democrats questioned the acting attorney general, Todd Blanche, and a U.S. attorney about subpoenas issued to Times journalists who reported on security concerns with the president’s new plane.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil Prices Tick Higher as U.S. Reinstates Iran Blockade
properties.descricao: The United States reinstated its blockade on Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz and shipping slowed to a crawl amid the renewed warfare in the critical waterway.

properties.titulo_evento: What Trump’s New Iran Blockade Could Mean for Oil Prices
properties.descricao: The first blockade in April choked off Iranian exports without causing a lasting price surge. Now global oil reserves are lower, and ships face heightened risks.

properties.titulo_evento: China’s Economy Grows at Slowest Pace in Years
properties.descricao: Economic growth of 4.3 percent in the second quarter, versus the same period last year, reflected a broad slump outside of the country’s export-oriented manufacturing might.
